def solve(landStartTime, landDuration, waterStartTime, waterDuration)
  min_time = Float::INFINITY
  n = landStartTime.length
  m = waterStartTime.length
  for i in 0...n do
    for j in 0...m do
      # Scenario 1: Land first then water
      land_end = landStartTime[i] + landDuration[i]
      water_start = [land_end, waterStartTime[j]].max
      water_end = water_start + waterDuration[j]
      scenario1 = water_end

      # Scenario 2: Water first then land
      water_end = waterStartTime[j] + waterDuration[j]
      land_start = [water_end, landStartTime[i]].max
      land_end = land_start + landDuration[i]
      scenario2 = land_end

      current_min = [scenario1, scenario2].min
      min_time = current_min if current_min < min_time
    end
  end
  min_time
end
